summary: Completed comprehensive testing of UI/UX overhaul - Desktop responsive layout, i18n translations, and SSE instant updates. All 15 backend tests pass. All frontend pages verified with desktop layouts (max-w-5xl+, md:grid-cols-2) and i18n translations (EN/IT). SSE endpoint accessible and admin mark-all-fees-paid triggers SSE notifications.

verified_features.Desktop Responsive Layout - WalletDashbo: PASSED - Uses max-w-lg md:max-w-3xl lg:max-w-5xl xl:max-w-6xl, md:grid-cols-2 for asset cards
verified_features.Desktop Responsive Layout - ProfilePage: PASSED - Uses max-w-5xl/6xl, md:grid-cols-2 for cards (2 columns on desktop)
verified_features.Desktop Responsive Layout - Transactions: PASSED - Uses max-w-5xl/6xl, md:grid-cols-2 for transaction cards
verified_features.Bottom Navigation Hidden on Desktop: PASSED - nav has md:hidden class, not visible on desktop viewport
verified_features.i18n Translations - LoginPage: PASSED - Title 'Log In to Blockchain.com', labels 'Email', 'Password'
verified_features.i18n Translations - RegisterPage: PASSED - Title 'Create your wallet', button 'Create Wallet', terms text
verified_features.i18n Translations - WalletDashboard: PASSED - 'Portfolio', 'Wallet', 'Assets', 'See all', action buttons (Swap, Send, Deposit, Withdraw)
verified_features.i18n Translations - TransactionsPage: PASSED - Filter buttons (All, Deposits, Sends, Swaps), status labels
verified_features.i18n Italian Translations Present: PASSED - i18n.js contains complete IT translations (>250 keys)
verified_features.Language Detection: PASSED - detectLanguage() function uses navigator.language to detect browser language
verified_features.Language Preference API: PASSED - PUT /api/auth/language endpoint updates user's preferred_language
verified_features.SSE Endpoint: PASSED - GET /api/events/stream returns text/event-stream, rejects invalid tokens
verified_features.Admin Mark-All-Fees-Paid SSE: PASSED - POST /api/admin/users/{id}/mark-all-fees-paid triggers notify_user() SSE event

mocked_apis.note: All financial data is admin-controlled/simulated. No real blockchain or banking integrations.

context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX overhaul completed. Desktop layouts use md:grid-cols-2 for 2-column card layout. i18n system uses getTranslations() from i18n.js with EN/IT translations. Browser language detection via navigator.language. SSE system at /api/events/stream works correctly. All pages tested: Login, Register, Wallet, Profile, Transactions, KYC.

notes.test_user_testdesktop: testdesktop@example.com user does not exist in database. Used cleanuser@test.com instead.
notes.italian_translations_verification: Italian translations verified present in i18n.js (>250 translation keys for IT). Browser testing shows EN translations since test browser language is English.
